narrative:
Tallmadge 1-B (precinct in Summit County) has 1,017 registered voters, with 57.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 12.6 percentage points.
